query:
-- 1. Create the per-meal habit (coachId = 1)
INSERT INTO habits (id, coachId, name, description, scope, frequency, targetDays)
VALUES (200001, 1, 'Eat slowly and mindfully', 'Take at least 15 minutes per meal, no screens', 'per_meal', 'daily', 7);

-- 2. Assign it to Jake (clientId = 1), active
INSERT INTO habit_assignments (id, habitId, clientId, active, assignedAt)
VALUES (200001, 200001, 1, 1, '2026-05-27 00:00:00');

-- 3. Insert completions for ~70% of Jake's meals (skip every 3rd meal to simulate imperfect adherence)
INSERT INTO meal_habit_completions (habitId, clientId, mealLogId)
SELECT 200001, 1, id FROM meal_logs
WHERE userId = 1 AND mealType = 'meal'
  AND loggedAt >= '2026-05-27 00:00:00'
  AND (id % 3) != 0
LIMIT 50;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3K2x4Mgy2RpvvVT.root --database HZf6zqYa94nKHY3YxXLHa5 --execute -- 1. Create the per-meal habit (coachId = 1)
INSERT INTO habits (id, coachId, name, description, scope, frequency, targetDays)
VALUES (200001, 1, 'Eat slowly and mindfully', 'Take at least 15 minutes per meal, no screens', 'per_meal', 'daily', 7);

-- 2. Assign it to Jake (clientId = 1), active
INSERT INTO habit_assignments (id, habitId, clientId, active, assignedAt)
VALUES (200001, 200001, 1, 1, '2026-05-27 00:00:00');

-- 3. Insert completions for ~70% of Jake's meals (skip every 3rd meal to simulate imperfect adherence)
INSERT INTO meal_habit_completions (habitId, clientId, mealLogId)
SELECT 200001, 1, id FROM meal_logs
WHERE userId = 1 AND mealType = 'meal'
  AND loggedAt >= '2026-05-27 00:00:00'
  AND (id % 3) != 0
LIMIT 50;
